extDescription.message: Capture the visible browser tab in one click and stack it locally for any MCP-capable LLM client.
extDescription.description: Extension description shown in the browser store and the extensions page.

toolbarOpenFolder.description: Toolbar button: open the stack folder in the OS file manager.

toolbarCopyAll.description: Toolbar button: copy every capture's absolute path.

toolbarCapture.description: Toolbar button: capture the current tab.

toolbarCaptureZone.description: Toolbar button: select a rectangular area of the page to capture.

toolbarCaptureFull.description: Toolbar button: capture the entire scrollable page (scroll-and-stitch).

itemCopyPath.description: Per-image control: copy this capture's absolute path.

confirmDeleteOne.description: Confirmation dialog before deleting one capture.

serverNotRunning.description: Shown when the local server cannot be reached.

zoneUnavailable.message: Area capture isn't available on this page.
zoneUnavailable.description: Notification when the selection overlay cannot be injected (e.g. browser-internal pages).

fullPageUnavailable.message: Full-page capture isn't available on this page.
fullPageUnavailable.description: Notification when the full-page capture cannot run (e.g. browser-internal pages).

fullPageTruncated.message: Captured the first $count$ screens — the page was too long to capture in full.
fullPageTruncated.description: Notification when a very long / endless page hit the full-page slice cap.

captureFailed.description: Notification when a capture fails for a reason other than the server being down.

serverOutdated.message: The snapstack server is out of date.
serverOutdated.description: Notification + popup banner statement when the server's wire protocol is older than the extension (version skew).

serverOutdatedAction.description: Link text appended after serverOutdated, pointing to the server update guide.

toolbarOpenSettings.description: Toolbar button: open the extension's options page.

optionsTitle.description: Title of the options page (browser tab + heading).

optionsSharedTitle.description: Heading of the server-owned, shared settings section.

optionsSharedHint.message: These capture settings are stored on the server and apply to every browser running the extension.

optionsLocalTitle.description: Heading of the per-browser (local) settings section.

optionsFieldFormat.description: Options field label: capture image format (WebP/PNG).

optionsFieldQuality.description: Options field label: lossy encoding quality, 0 to 1.

optionsFieldMaxEdge.message: Max edge in px (0 = no downscale)
optionsFieldMaxEdge.description: Options field label: longest-edge downscale target in pixels.

optionsFieldMaxSlices.description: Options field label: max stitched slices for a full-page capture.

optionsFieldServerBase.description: Options field label: local URL of the snapstack server.

optionsFieldShortcut.description: Options field label: the keyboard shortcut that triggers a capture.

optionsShortcutEdit.description: Button that opens the browser's extension-shortcuts settings.

optionsShortcutHint.message: Set or change the shortcut in your browser's extension shortcuts settings.

optionsShortcutNone.description: Shown when no keyboard shortcut is assigned.

optionsSave.description: Button: persist the settings of a section.

optionsSaved.description: Confirmation shown after settings are saved.

optionsServerUnreachable.message: Server unreachable — start or update the snapstack server to edit the shared settings.
optionsServerUnreachable.description: Shown when the shared (server) settings can't be loaded.

optionsSaveError.message: Could not save — check the server.

commandCapture.description: Description of the keyboard-shortcut command, shown in the browser's shortcuts UI.
